problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
